## Checklist

- [ ] This PR was discussed with the maintainer either via GitHub issue or other means (Also check if this PR is small enough not to need discussion e.g. typo fix)
- [ ] Branched from `dev` using the `{type}/short-descriptive-name` convention
      (`feature`, `fix`, `refactor`, or `chore`).
- [ ] This PR targets the `dev` branch (not `main`).
- [ ] `swiftlint lint` runs clean (no new warnings or errors).
- [ ] The full test suite passes locally.
- [ ] Testing steps are documented above.
- [ ] This change was largely AI-generated rather than hand-written. (If checked,
      please confirm you followed the AI-assisted contribution best practices in
      CONTRIBUTING.md.)
